summary: The user sought advice on shoe care, specifically for their old white Nike shoes, silver stilettos, and a potential new pair of Dr. Martens. They received tips on cleaning, maintenance, and storage, as well as guidance on stretching shoes and breaking in new pairs to prevent discomfort.
facts: The user regularly goes to the gym and owns old white Nike shoes that are showing signs of wear. The user wore silver stilettos to a party on New Year's Eve and experienced discomfort after walking home when their Uber did not arrive. The user is considering buying a new pair of Dr. Martens shoes. The user is interested in organizing their shoe collection to prevent clutter and maintain shoe condition. The user has been advised to apply a waterproofing spray and leather conditioner to their Dr. Martens before wearing them. The user was informed that Dr. Martens can take time to break in and received a step-by-step guide for the process.
